## What happened
PIX11 reported that a pet food recall was issued for products contaminated with Salmonella, Listeria, and E. coli.

## Key facts
- Date: March 20, 2026
- Affected animals: pets (other)
- Pathogens: Salmonella, Listeria, and E. coli
- Source: PIX11

## What pet owners should do
Review the recall list, discard or return affected pet food, and monitor pets for gastrointestinal or systemic illness. Contact a veterinarian promptly if symptoms appear. Practice good hygiene when handling pet food.
